languages.text: "Место, где сгинула легенда рода Вольных Торговцев… почему меня не удивляет, что именно отсюда по миру начала расползаться ксеноересь?"
languages.translation_comment: In the ancient camp of the hero's ancestor, broken in the middle of the ruins of unknown xenos, who recently got out and gave the world a thrashing

languages.original_text: "The place where the legend of the Rogue Trader dynasty perished... Why does it not surprise me that this is where xenoheresy began spreading across the world?"

languages.text: "The place where the legend of the Rogue Trader dynasty perished... Why does it not surprise me that this is where xenoheresy began spreading across the world?"
languages.original_text: "Место, где сгинула легенда рода Вольных Торговцев… почему меня не удивляет, что именно отсюда по миру начала расползаться ксеноересь?"

traits.locale_text: "The place where the legend of the Rogue Trader dynasty perished... Why does it not surprise me that this is where xenoheresy began spreading across the world?"
"The place where the legend of the Rogue Trader dynasty perished... Why does it not surprise me that this is where xenoheresy began spreading across the world?"
"The place where the legend of the Rogue Trader dynasty perished... Why does it not surprise me that this is where xenoheresy began spreading across the world?"

languages.text: «El lugar donde la leyenda de la dinastía de Comerciantes Independientes murió... ¿Por qué no me sorprende que la xenoherejía se propagara desde aquí?».
languages.original_text: "The place where the legend of the Rogue Trader dynasty perished... Why does it not surprise me that this is where xenoheresy began spreading across the world?"

traits.locale_text: «El lugar donde la leyenda de la dinastía de Comerciantes Independientes murió... ¿Por qué no me sorprende que la xenoherejía se propagara desde aquí?».

languages.text: “行商浪人王朝传奇人物的陨落之地……如果说异形异端就是从这里开始蔓延到整个行星的，我可丝毫都不会感到意外。”
languages.original_text: "The place where the legend of the Rogue Trader dynasty perished... Why does it not surprise me that this is where xenoheresy began spreading across the world?"

traits.locale_text: “行商浪人王朝传奇人物的陨落之地……如果说异形异端就是从这里开始蔓延到整个行星的，我可丝毫都不会感到意外。”

languages.text: « Le lieu où a péri la légende de la dynastie des libres-marchands... Sans surprise, c'est aussi ici que la xénohérésie a commencé à se répandre à travers le monde... »
languages.original_text: "The place where the legend of the Rogue Trader dynasty perished... Why does it not surprise me that this is where xenoheresy began spreading across the world?"

traits.locale_text: « Le lieu où a péri la légende de la dynastie des libres-marchands... Sans surprise, c'est aussi ici que la xénohérésie a commencé à se répandre à travers le monde... »

languages.text: "Hür Tacir hanedanlığının efsanesinin yok olduğu yer... Zeno kâfirliğinin dünyaya yayılmaya başladığı yerin burası olması beni neden şaşırtmıyor?"
languages.original_text: "The place where the legend of the Rogue Trader dynasty perished... Why does it not surprise me that this is where xenoheresy began spreading across the world?"

traits.locale_text: "Hür Tacir hanedanlığının efsanesinin yok olduğu yer... Zeno kâfirliğinin dünyaya yayılmaya başladığı yerin burası olması beni neden şaşırtmıyor?"

languages.text: 「ローグトレーダー王朝の伝説的人物が滅んだ場所か……ここがこの世界に異種族異端の蔓延し始めた場所だというのも、なぜか驚くには当たらないな」
languages.original_text: "The place where the legend of the Rogue Trader dynasty perished... Why does it not surprise me that this is where xenoheresy began spreading across the world?"

traits.locale_text: 「ローグトレーダー王朝の伝説的人物が滅んだ場所か……ここがこの世界に異種族異端の蔓延し始めた場所だというのも、なぜか驚くには当たらないな」

languages.text: "Der Ort, an dem die Legende des Freihändlers endete ... Warum bin ich nicht überrascht, dass die Xenos-Ketzerei hier ihren Ursprung hatte?"
languages.original_text: "The place where the legend of the Rogue Trader dynasty perished... Why does it not surprise me that this is where xenoheresy began spreading across the world?"

traits.locale_text: "Der Ort, an dem die Legende des Freihändlers endete ... Warum bin ich nicht überrascht, dass die Xenos-Ketzerei hier ihren Ursprung hatte?"
